cases.prompt: An attacker has Global Admin in our tenant right now. Walk me through evicting them.

expect.label: stand up a trusted foundation / PAW before responding from untrusted infra
evict in one coordinated action; partial eviction tips off the adversary
preserve forensic evidence before remediating where investigation is required

cases.prompt: How do we harden the tenant after eviction so the attacker cannot return?

expect.label: least privilege / PIM for admin access
engage qualified incident responders for major incidents
